requirements_addressed: AC-001: Test file created at tests/test_goal_md_consistency.py
AC-002: GOAL.md text valid values match TEXT_VALUES
AC-003: GOAL.md topic valid values match TOPIC_VALUES
AC-004: GOAL.md ao valid values match AO_PATTERN (AO1-AO6)
AC-005: GOAL.md grade_target range matches validator (4-9 + null)
AC-006: GOAL.md layer values match Metadata.layer Literal
AC-007: GOAL.md type values match Metadata.type Literal

completion_promises.evidence: Created tests/test_goal_md_consistency.py with 24 tests across 8 test classes plus a seam test class. File compiles and all tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md text valid values match TEXT_VALUES in validator.py
completion_promises.evidence: TestTextValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: exact match of GOAL.md text values vs TEXT_VALUES, subset check, and Metadata.text Literal vs TEXT_VALUES consistency. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md topic valid values match TOPIC_VALUES in validator.py
completion_promises.evidence: TestTopicValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: exact match of GOAL.md topic values vs TOPIC_VALUES, subset check, and Metadata.topic Literal vs TOPIC_VALUES consistency. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md ao valid values match AO_PATTERN (AO1-AO6)
completion_promises.evidence: TestAoValuesConsistency class has 3 tests: GOAL.md ao values are exactly AO1-AO6, AO_PATTERN accepts all 6 codes, AO_PATTERN rejects AO7+. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md grade_target range matches validator (4-9 + null)
completion_promises.evidence: TestGradeTargetConsistency class has 4 tests: GOAL.md lists 4-9 and null, Metadata validator accepts 4-9, accepts None, rejects grades outside range (0, 1, 2, 3, 10, 11, -1). All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md layer values match Metadata.layer Literal type
completion_promises.evidence: TestLayerValuesConsistency has 1 test: extracts GOAL.md layer valid values (behaviour, knowledge) and compares against Metadata.layer Literal args using _get_literal_args helper. Exact match verified. Passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies GOAL.md type values match Metadata.type Literal type
completion_promises.evidence: TestTypeValuesConsistency has 1 test: extracts GOAL.md type valid values (reasoning, direct) and compares against Metadata.type Literal args. Exact match verified. Passes.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies all generation target categories appear in metadata topic valid values
completion_promises.evidence: TestGenerationTargetTopicConsistency has 2 tests: (1) maps all 7 Generation Targets categories to topic values via _CATEGORY_TO_TOPIC dict and verifies each appears in GOAL.md topic valid values, (2) verifies all mapped topics exist in validator.py TOPIC_VALUES. All pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Test verifies all evaluation criterion names are valid Python identifiers (match ^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$)
completion_promises.evidence: TestEvaluationCriterionIdentifiers has 2 tests: (1) regex match against ^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$ for all criterion names, (2) explicit hyphen check. All 5 criteria pass (socratic_approach, ao_accuracy, mark_scheme_aligned, age_appropriate, factual_accuracy).

completion_promises.criterion_text: All tests pass with pytest tests/test_goal_md_consistency.py -v
completion_promises.evidence: Ran pytest tests/test_goal_md_consistency.py -v: 24 passed in 0.03s. Zero failures.
